project_type: Next.js 16 admin dashboard with Prisma ORM and SQLite
language: TypeScript (primary), Python and Shell (new polyglot layers)
test_framework: No test framework configured; verification via npm run build
test_command: npm run build && python3 scripts/guard/scan-input.py --test && bash scripts/guard/scan-skill.sh --test
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript/Next.js breakage. 2. Run python3 scripts/guard/scan-input.py with test input to verify Python layer. 3. Run bash scripts/guard/scan-skill.sh --help to verify shell layer. 4. Run bash scripts/guard/validate-output.sh --help to verify output shell layer.
setup_instructions: npm install (already done); Python 3.9+ available via pyenv; Bash 5.2 available
environment_constraints: Python must use only stdlib (no pip install). Shell must be POSIX-compatible. Node.js child_process used for bridge.
contribution_requirements: Use Bahasa Indonesia for UI labels. Ensure npm run build and npm run lint pass. Follow existing naming conventions.
key_patterns: Agent guard files live in src/lib/agent-guard/. Each layer exports a typed interface. The index.ts re-exports all modules and provides processInput/processOutput orchestrator functions. YAML policies will go in scripts/guard/policies/. Python/Shell scripts in scripts/guard/.
directory_structure: src/app/(dashboard)/ - UI pages, src/app/api/ - API routes, src/lib/ - shared libraries, src/components/ui/ - shadcn components, prisma/ - schema and seed, scripts/guard/ (NEW) - polyglot guard layers
